title: 🪞 Imaginary Dimensions (Complex Space)
name: Imaginary Dimensions (Complex Space)
what_it_is: Extending space into the complex plane—imaginary numbers used as spatial coordinates, creating surreal, folded, or rotating space axes.
how_to_use: her limbs extend into imaginary axes—curling into space not perceptible in real dimensions
the corridor twists through i-space—angles unfold in complex number geometry
animation_behavior: Space folds in i-directions, parts flicker in and out of visibility, limbs rotate into fourth axis ---
